name: Edward Blackwell
content: I've been dealing in luxury watches for over twenty years and Bland & Co stand apart. Their knowledge of the market is exceptional, and the transaction was handled with complete discretion. The Patek they sourced for me was authenticated to the highest standard.

name: Amelia Forsythe
content: I inherited a collection of pieces and had no idea of their value. The team at Bland & Co were patient, incredibly knowledgeable, and offered a price well above what I'd expected. The whole process took less than an hour.

name: Daniel Osei
content: I approach precious metals the same way I approach any asset class — with rigour. Bland & Co provided LBMA certified bars with full documentation and their pricing was competitive. I'll be returning for further purchases.

name: Victoria Lam
content: Sold my Rolex through Bland & Co after getting quotes elsewhere. They beat every offer by a meaningful margin and the payment was same-day as promised. No drama, no delays — exactly as described.
